text:
/ci1 2 こいつ、大きいくせに動き早すぎッ！
どうにかして勢いを止められれば
一気に攻められるのに！

反応を見るに、足回りが怪しいです！
そこを集中して攻撃すれば
おとなしくなってくれるかも！

/ci1 2 Something this big shouldn't move so
fast! We could hit it hard if we could just
stop it in its tracks!

From the readings I'm getting, there's
something going on near its feet!
Focus your attacks there, and you
might create an opening!
